response: {"action": "sql", "sql": "SELECT cm.seg_cd, SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS tot_revenue FROM ord_hdr oh JOIN cust_mstr cm ON oh.cust_id = cm.cust_id AND oh.ord_dt >= cm.eff_start_dt AND (cm.eff_end_dt IS NULL OR oh.ord_dt <= cm.eff_end_dt) WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'CANCELLED' GROUP BY cm.seg_cd", "reason": null}
